name: GarudRecon
desc: GarudRecon automates domain recon with top open-source tools to discover assets, enumerate subdomains, and detect XSS, SQLi, LFI, RCE & more.
descFull: GarudRecon automates domain recon with top open-source tools to discover assets, enumerate subdomains, and detect XSS, SQLi, LFI, RCE & more.
